extraction_notes: Available sources do not contain documented music parameters such as tempo, keys, chord progressions, or specific SFX characteristics. The TCRF source contains only uncompiled ASM code fragments and data location pointers without musical analysis. Wikipedia credits composer Hideki Kanazashi but provides no technical music documentation. Reviewer notes mention 'repetitive' music and praise for 'graphics and music' work but no quantifiable audio parameters are documented.
